fields.name: ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the field.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the field.

fields.name: Duplicate Value
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value of the field in the duplicate record.

fields.name: Current Value
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value of the field in the current record.

fields.name: Override
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the field value of the current record should be overridden by the value of the duplicate record.

fields.name: Duplicate Count
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of records related to the duplicate record.

fields.name: Current Count
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of records related to the current record.

fields.name: Table ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the table.

fields.name: Table Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the table.

fields.name: In Primary Key
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the field is part of the primary key.

fields.name: Data Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the data type of the field.
